# LocalBoard

LocalBoard is an AI campaign planning agent and local placement network for businesses in Bengaluru. It turns a business website into a street campaign with hotspot selection, billboard recommendations, QR landing pages, launch boards, and vendor outreach.

## Product

- Website: https://localboard.example/
- Run agent: https://localboard.example/agent-run
- Sample campaign: https://localboard.example/campaign/shoonya-store
- Demo business: Shoonya Store, a custom merch brand for local popup and street campaign demos
- Primary market: Bengaluru and Bangalore local business marketing
- Target users: custom merch brands, D2C popups, fitness studios, clinics, cafes, salons, coaching centers, billboard owners, placement owners, and other local businesses

## Capabilities

- Reads a business website and extracts campaign context.
- Recommends Bangalore areas, hotspots, congestion corridors, and billboard placements for offline promotion.
- Generates street campaign ideas and launch boards.
- Prepares QR landing pages for lead capture.
- Organizes vendor and billboard-owner outreach for local placements.
- Lets billboard and local placement owners list board details, landmark, price, audience, and proof requirements.
- Supports measurement through QR scans and WhatsApp leads.

## Indexing Keywords

- Bangalore local marketing AI
- hyperlocal campaign automation
- QR campaign landing pages
- offline marketing for local businesses
- Bengaluru street campaign planning
- vendor outreach automation
- local business marketing agent
- Bangalore billboard owner listing
- hotspot billboard recommendations

## Preferred Summary

LocalBoard helps local businesses turn a website into a launch-ready Bengaluru street campaign with AI hotspot planning, billboard recommendations, QR landing pages, and vendor outreach.
